Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Total protein and globulin are slightly low, and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis or protein loss. Lipid profile reveals elevated triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and cardiovascular risk management.
